_source: gin7 manual pp.9-13 via logh7-manual-canon.md §1 (PDF-verified against .omo/work/gin7manual/manual-text.md PAGE 10-13)
_confidence_notes: All values cross-verified against the extracted manual text (PAGE markers 10-13). No extraction-uncertain values in this range.
Manual uses 宇宙暦 (Universal/Space Calendar). End date is the absolute session time limit.
Several features carry the manual's own '現在未実装' (not implemented in original) note: economy management, AI-controlled unchosen canon characters. Preserved as _unimplemented_in_original.

Generate-character inheritance threshold is described qualitatively as '一定以上の評価ポイント (evaluation points above a certain threshold)'; the manual does not give an exact numeric value here — it cross-references the parameter section. Flagged _uncertain on the numeric threshold.
Local Victory population tie is explicitly resolved in favor of the Alliance (同盟軍).

game_structure._note: Two modes run on one shared real-time clock; no global pause (p10, p12).

covers: 通常のキャラクター移動 (ordinary character movement)

modes.trigger: Entering the same grid as an enemy-force unit.
modes.ends_when: Only one faction's units remain in the grid.
modes.planet_fortress_extra: Planet/fortress grids additionally require full occupation before the battle ends (see §6.1).
modes.constraint: A character inside a tactical game cannot input any strategy command for its duration.

victory_principle._note: Victory requires direct combat success, but final victory is impossible without non-military attention. National administration and military spending are funded by 各惑星から徴収する税金 (taxes collected from each planet), so economy management is critical.

economy_management._unimplemented_note: 経済関連は現在未実装となっております (economy features not implemented in the original).

session.definition: A shared virtual space for all users connected to one host computer. All commands are processed server-side (authoritative) and results are returned.

re_entry_restriction.trigger: When a player is excluded from a session for any reason (e.g. character death) and re-registers for the same session.
restrictions: Cannot use an original (canon) character to return to that session.
Can only return to the faction the player belonged to at the moment of exclusion.

termination_and_restart.ja: セッションの終了について
termination_and_restart.restart: An ended session, as a rule, restarts from the initial conditions.

time_progression._note: Real-time progression at 24× real time. Tactical battles run concurrently on the same clock — no global pause for other players.

table.in_game_time_ja: ゲーム内24 時間（1 日）
ゲーム内30 日（1 ヶ月）

character_types.ja: オリジナルキャラクター
character_types.description: A character that appeared in the source work. Parameters are pre-set.

character_types.ja: ジェネレートキャラクター
character_types.description: Player-created within the rule limits; free choice of name and face CG (顔CG).
Any canon character not chosen by a player is controlled by the AI.
character_types._unimplemented_note: AI機能は現在未実装となっております (AI functionality not implemented in the original).

original_character_assignment.ja: オリジナルキャラクターの使用について

eligibility_review.description: At session start and at mid-session join, players who wish to use an original character are reviewed against that character's preset assignment conditions. A player who has not cleared a character's conditions cannot even apply for it.

lottery.description: If multiple eligible players want the same character, a lottery (抽選) decides the winner.

continuation.description: Original characters cannot be carried over at all (一切の継続使用は不可能).

original_character_assignment.release_note: For releasing the use of an original character, see the official website (p12).

generate_character_inheritance.ja: ジェネレートキャラクターの継続使用
generate_character_inheritance.default_scope: As a rule, a generate character can only be played within the session it was created in.

carry_over_condition.description: A character that earned evaluation points (評価ポイント) above a certain threshold in a session can be carried over to the next session.
carry_over_condition._uncertain_note: Manual states '一定以上の評価ポイント' (evaluation points above a certain threshold) without an exact number; it cross-references the character-parameter section.

age_cap.ja: 年齢が60 歳に到達するまで
age_cap.description: Inheritance/carry-over can only be done until the character reaches age 60.

generate_character_deletion.description: A generate character may be deleted (freeing the player to create a new generate character or enter an original-character lottery) only when ALL conditions hold.

conditions.ja: 現在の階級が「大佐」以下である
conditions.en: Current rank is Colonel (大佐) or below.

conditions.ja: 居住区もしくはホテルの自室に滞在している
conditions.en: Staying in own room in the residential quarter (居住区) or a hotel.
conditions.ko: 거주구 또는 호텔의 자기 방에 체류 중

conditions.ja: ［燃料補給］［戦略索敵］等の持続するコマンド効果中ではない
conditions.en: Not under any persistent command effect such as 燃料補給 (refuel) or 戦略索敵 (strategic recon).
conditions.ko: [연료보급] [전략색적] 등 지속 커맨드 효과 중이 아님

win_loss_conditions.ja: ゲームの勝敗について

conditions.ja: 敵勢力の首都惑星を占領した場合。
conditions.en: An enemy capital planet (首都惑星) is occupied.
conditions.ko: 적 세력의 수도 행성을 점령한 경우.

conditions.ja: 帝国/同盟の正規軍陣営が支配している星系が、首都星系を含め3 星系以下となった場合。
conditions.en: A regular-army faction's (Empire or Alliance) controlled star systems — including the capital system (首都星系) — drop to 3 systems or fewer.
conditions.ko: 제국/동맹 정규군 진영이 지배하는 성계가 수도 성계를 포함해 3성계 이하가 된 경우.

conditions.ja: 宇宙暦801 年7 月27 日00 時00 分までに上記２点の条件を満たす事が出来なかった場合。
conditions.en: Neither of the above two conditions is met by 00:00 on 27 July, Universal Calendar year 801.
conditions.ko: 우주력 801년 7월 27일 00시 00분까지 위 두 조건을 충족하지 못한 경우.

evaluation_tiers._note: Four tiers; each awards a different amount of end-of-session merit points (功績ポイント).

conditions.ja: セッション内人口の90%以上を支配下に置いていること。
conditions.en: Holding ≥ 90% of the in-session population under control.

conditions.ja: 敵勢力との艦艇ユニット数比が10 倍以上であること。
conditions.en: Ship-unit count ratio vs. the enemy is ≥ 10×.

conditions.ja: セッション終了時に、クーデターが発生していないこと。
conditions.en: No coup (クーデター) has occurred at session end.

conditions.ja: セッション終了時に、皇帝もしくは帝国軍最高司令官の職務権限カードを保有するキャラクターが、敵首都星系に移動していること(帝国軍のみ)
conditions.en: At session end, a character holding the Emperor (皇帝) or Imperial Supreme Commander (帝国軍最高司令官) duty-authority card has moved to the enemy capital system. (Empire only)

conditions.ja: 上記いずれかの決定的勝利条件が一つでも満たされていない場合。
conditions.en: Victory achieved but at least one Decisive Victory condition is unmet.

conditions.ja: 敵首都惑星の占領以外でセッションが終了し、セッション内人口比で敵を上回っている場合。
conditions.en: Session ended by a means other than enemy capital-planet capture, AND in-session population exceeds the enemy's.

conditions.ja: なお、人口が同数の場合は、同盟軍の局地的勝利と見なされます。
conditions.en: If population is tied, it is judged a Local Victory for the Alliance (同盟軍).

conditions.ja: 上記の勝利条件全てに劣った場合。
conditions.en: Inferior in all of the above victory conditions.
